raw_consumer_statement:
Dear Citibank Executive Office, I am writing to formally reiterate and escalate my dispute concerning a series of fraudulent transactions on my Best Buy Citibank credit card and the improper closure of my account while these disputes remain unresolved. 



Despite numerous communications, my legitimate fraud claims have been repeatedly denied with no substantive evidence provided. Citibank 's rationale such as a chip was read or a card was presented does not fulfill investigative obligations under federal law. 



Key Facts : XXXX. I did not authorize or participate in the disputed transactions. 
XXXX. My card was never lost or compromised. 
XXXX. No individual was authorized to use my account. 
XXXX. No investigative records have been disclosed to me, in violation of Regulation Z. 
XXXX. I received multiple fraud acknowledgment letters : XX/XX/XXXX ; XX/XX/XXXX ; XX/XX/XXXX. 
XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, Citibank initiated a fraud alert. 
XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, I was enrolled in XXXX without full dispute resolution. 
XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, Citibank attempted to reverse credits without full evidence. 



This conduct violates my rights under : - Fair Credit Billing Act ( 15 U.S.C. 1666 ) - Regulation Z ( 12 CFR 1026.13 ) - Consumer Financial Protection Act ( CFPA ) I am requesting : - Full removal of fraudulent charges. 


- Written confirmation of reinstated account.

- Disclosure of all investigative materials.

- Cessation of collection or negative reporting.
